title: [App] Flamingo - Unpairing the charge case from headset
scenario: Clearing trusted device list and unpairing charge case causes headset to reconnect as standalone without charge case on Voyager Free 60+
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Tap 'Clear' next to 'Clear Trusted Device List'.
Verify the app shows the device as disconnected.
Remove the device from the Poly Studio Mobile app (e.g., tap Forget or Remove).
Go to phone Settings → Bluetooth, find the device in the paired list, and tap 'Forget' or 'Unpair'.
Reconnect the headset by putting it into pairing mode and selecting it in the Poly Studio Mobile app or phone Bluetooth settings.
Observe the device connection status in the app.
expected: The headset reconnects and is displayed as a standalone device (headset only, without the charge case).
